# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

This is a static portfolio site with no authentication, database, or user data collection
beyond what is described in the privacy policy.

To report a security concern, please email **carlos@tooltician.com**.
You should receive a reply within 48 hours.

For encrypted communication, ask for the PGP key via email.

## Scope

- https://tooltician.com/ and all subdomains
- The GitHub repository at https://github.com/cortega26/cortega26.github.io

## Out of Scope

- Third-party services linked from the site (Formspree, Calendly, Ahrefs, LinkedIn)
